title: CF616A-Comparing Two Long Integers
content:
有关数位的简单模拟题。

题意概括

给定两个数字序列a和b，根据其大小关系输出**>、＜或=**；注意，两个序列的长度不超过$10^6$。

题目分析

不怎么难的模拟题，抹除两个序列最前面0后，先比较数字序列的长度，若相等再逐位比较数字大小即可。

代码

#include <bits/stdc++.h>
#define int long long
using namespace std;
char a[1000005], b[1000005];

signed main() {
	char now = getchar();
	int flaga = 0, flagb = 0;
	int saveZero = 0;
	while (now <= '9' && now >= '0') {
		if (now > '9' || now < '0')
			break;
		if (!saveZero) {
			if (now == '0') {
				now = getchar();
			} else {
				saveZero = 1;
				a[flaga] = now;
				flaga++;
				now = getchar();
			}
		} else {
			a[flaga] = now;
			flaga++;
			now = getchar();
		}
	}
	saveZero = 0, now = getchar();
	while (now <= '9' && now >= '0') {
		if (now > '9' || now < '0')
			break;
		if (!saveZero) {
			if (now == '0') {
				now = getchar();
			} else {
				saveZero = 1;
				b[flagb] = now;
				flagb++;
				now = getchar();
			}
		} else {
			b[flagb] = now;
			flagb++;
			now = getchar();
		}
	}
	if (flaga > flagb) {
		cout << ">" << endl;
	} else if (flaga < flagb) {
		cout << "<" << endl;
	} else {
		for (register int i = 0; i < flaga; i++) {
			if (a[i] > b[i]) {
				cout << ">" << endl;
				return 0;
			} else if (a[i] < b[i]) {
				cout << "<" << endl;
				return 0;
			}
		}
		cout << "=" << endl;
	}
	return 0;
}
